feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error when opening Iflow in trial account
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting this error when opening iflow in trial account.

Should we create incident with sap even for trial account issue?

Error while loading the details of the integration flow. Try opening the artifact again. If the issue persists, report the incident to SAP

entry.title: How can I fix the error that prevents creating an integration flow in SAP Integration Suite?
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I’m trying to call an OData service via Integration Suite using my SAP BTP trial account. However, after clicking the Add button, no integration flow schema appears that would allow me to call my OData service.

Could anyone help me understand what might be causing this?

entry.title: Are there step by step guidelines in learning HUB for a specific integration scenario using BTP IS?
entry.content: Hello Experts, I am Integration consultant and new to BTP IS learning, I want to understand the Integration patterns and protocols configuration using BTP IS. Do SAP learning hub has step by step guidelines for specific Integration scenarios while working using BTP integration suite. If so can you pls let me know how to search for that.

entry.title: ERROR : While using OData adapter to fetch MPL to make report.
entry.content:
Hi @everyone

I hope your doing well.

I am working with OData adapter to fetch MPLs from CPI. Strangely while i am triggering the flow, It is keep on processing state and at last it is going to Abandoned status. 

My analysis on this, While i am trying to fetch less data records i.e appx 1000 it is fine. While i am trying to fetch more it is going in processing.

My requirement, I need to fetch the MPLs and need to sort out the records based on Iflow names(There are 45 Iflows, It will be given dynamically what ever is needed.) and TimeStamp. I have to make a report and show the success and failure count for dynamically given ifows. So, to achieve this first i need to fetch MPL records based on time stamp. There are more than 1000 records.

HELP. So, Please let me know how can i achieve this to fetch high data records.

I am attaching the Iflow snips.  

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries OData SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: BTP Integration Suite Error
entry.content:
In the BTP trial environment, when using the Integration Suite service, I am unable to create a new Integration Flow or open an existing one. The error message is:

"Error while loading the details of the integration flow. Try opening the artifact again. If the issue persists, report the incident to SAP."

How can i fix it?

Region: US East

entry.title: Facing isuue with manage capabilites
entry.content: Error P013: Activation of Trading Partner Management capability has failed. If the issue persists, learn to solve from integration experts by creating a post in the community for SAP Integration Suite.

entry.title: IDOC xsd import giving error in message mapping in SAP CPI iflow
entry.content:
Hi experts,
I am trying to upload the IDOC xsd (from PO ->IDOC ->xsd) but i am getting the error on attributes and also on idoc control segment field
Reference - IDOC xsd import error.png
 
I then came across the below post
CPI Message Mapping XSD Error
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/cpi-message-mapping-xsd-error/qaq-p/12048997
 
I tried to follow the steps as suggested -
Downloaded the XML Schema at http://www.w3.org/2001/xml.xsd and uploaded it as a resource to the iflow
the IDOC xsd does not have any reference and no import 
But tried it anyways which i think is the wrong location anyways and it gave error as expected -<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" schemaLocation="xml.xsd"/>
 
I have searched and i am unable to find why an IDOC xsd generated from PO is not getting uploaded correctly
I can view it correctly and the xsd is valid
 
Please help me as i need to be able to upload the xsd for my message mapping

entry.title: What are other connectivity options apart from SAP Integration Suite in Private cloud edition
entry.content: Hi Everyone, I want to know about connectivity options from sap to non sap legacy system in Private cloud edition. Integration Suite is not in picture. So what else we can recommend as offerings from SAP BTP Platform?

entry.title: Integration Suite Subscription Failed in Trail Account
entry.content:
Hi,

I was unable to subscribe integration suite in my trail account, I have tried with other trail account.. same issue.

can anyone help me on this?

 

Thanks,

Prem

entry.title: I can't create the Integration Suite Subscription with my trial account
entry.content:
I can't create the Integration Suite Subscription with my trial account, it fails and no details why.

Do you know if the integration Suite environment is available to add as a trial rigth now?

entry.title: Fiori APP / Odata V2 to API
entry.content:
I have created a FIORI App with classical odata V2.

I'd like to use API data with Odata by using CPI

Instead of 
APP (odata) -> destination back-end 
APP (OData) -> Destination CPI -> Use API

I suppose this is possible but I don't know exactly how to do that.

I have 2 sub-account. One for the APP, One for Integration Suite. 

Do you know steps to acheive that ? Ideally with an example.

Thanks gurus for your pov on this little challenge

entry.title: SAP BTP IS - Access Policies to restrict monitoring or object details?
entry.content:
Hi all, 
I've been seeing the capabilities of Access Policies in Integration Suite and that's clear. I've done a PoC and worked as intended. But... as intended is not enough.

I want to isolate not just the artifacts at  design time or just the change of traceability of deployed iflows when someone is operating the iPaaS. I want to fully isolate / restrict the objects. So If i have a pattern in policies that grants access to objects with the pattern 'AAA' the users that hasn't this, should not be able to:
- see that objects at design time (or at least the name of the objects in the corresponding list, but without access to the detail).
- Not able to monitor them. Now you can see them at monitoring tiles, even see the log. 

As explained in Package-Level Access Policy and in Artifact-Level Access Policy looks like this is the intended flow.  So what I'm trying to do is out of scope atm.

So, my point is, if i have a TeamAAA that has to monitors JUST the integrations with 'AAA' pattern how can I achieve it?

Exists the option to avoid the access to the object details or to exclude absolutely an iflow from monitoring? 

I want (wish 🙏 ) to be able to isolate them directly from SAP BTP IS. I've checked the roadmap and didn't see anything.

entry.title: Error in outbound IDoc: "EDI: Field ARCKEY in control record with value"
entry.content:
Hi!

Our team is currently trying to establish connection between BTP and S4HANA via IDoc adapter. We already made the inbound connection work. but encountered an error during the outbound flow. We received the following error:

"EDI: Field ARCKEY in control record with value 'urn:sap.com:msgid=<MESSAGE ID>'". The message ID part is a 27-character alphanumeric code.

Is there a way to remove this field? Or a way for this field to automatically not populate any value? I tried manually removing the value via WE19 and it worked, so I figured removing this field is the only way. We cannot find a KB that could solve this issue. 

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Records Merge to one xml based on condition after splitter
entry.content:
csv data:
Person_ID,Person_FirstName,Person_LastName,Company_Code,Company_Name,Country
1001,Rahul,A,101,Santoor,India
1002,Ramesh,S,101,Santoor,India
1003,Ravali,P,103,Medmix,US
1004,Raju,Y,104,Dove,AUS
1005,Ritesh,L,104,Dove,AUS
1006,Varun,P,104,Dove,Spain
1007,James,Y,105,Vivel,France

I'm getting separate records for 1 country in the end message because of using general splitter.
But i want all records of same country in the same end message.

How can i get same country xml records in one message

entry.title: mapping resources cannot be downloaded while migrating sap po objects in sap cpi
entry.content:
Hello,

we are trying to migrate sap po interfaces to sap cpi .It worked for sometime after that we started getting below error in cpi

mapping resources cannot be downloaded

Can someone guide what could be the issue ?

As it worked and stopped working later.I have the required roles in PI  SAP_XI_ADMINISTRATOR or SAP_XI_CONTENT_ORGANIZER also the cloud connector configuration for the ESR system  resource access sub-paths all looks fine

Thanks,
Sahana

entry.title: Custom CBC Customizations
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m building an integration between SAP Public Cloud and an external system. The external system sends messages via SAP Integration Suite, and some documents need to be created using API calls. In order to do that, I need a mapping that can be customized somewhere in the system.

For example, the external system contains Company Codes that are not part of SAP, and based on those, we need to determine which Company Code in SAP should be used. The client would like this customization to be handled inside SAP and to retrieve the values via web interface when needed.

In this example, we would need a table with two columns, where the first column is the external system’s ID (used as a key), and the second column is the SAP Company Code, for example:

 

External    

SAP

Comp1      

1000

Comp2      

2000

Comp4      

3000

 

The customer wants to manage this data in CBC on CUST/PROD and transport it to TEST and then to PROD using transport requests.

I’ve tried several ways to achieve this:

  1. I created a Custom Business Object and I’m able to access it via web service. It can be maintained on CUST/PROD, but the data cannot be included in a Customizing Transport.
  2. I created Tables using Eclipse and published them locally via Service Bindings. The tables and related objects are in a local package, so I cannot transport this development to the test system. In my opinion this is okay since the objects are local, but I was able to launch the Fiori app "Custom Business Configuration", which saves the data to a Customizing Transport Request. I can release the local request.
  3. Same as point 2, except the objects are in a package assigned to Software Component ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT. The objects were added to a Transport Request that has an ATO route. In this case, the same thing works, but the objects still cannot be transported to the test system because the request cannot be released.

 

Other questions:

  • We use Cloud ALM with scoping. 
  • I have access rights for process authoring but I can not create CBC in it.
  • Is CALM relevant for my problem?
  • I used this Create a SAP Fiori based Table Maintenance app with SAP BTP, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials  as template but it is not generally for Public Cloud
  • Annotation @ObjectModel.configuration  is missing. Is that relevant?
  • In CBC when I change scope I do not see "Custom" tile. 
  • Scope is in status Completed and when I wont to edit it I got a strange message "If you edit the scope, one or multiple already confirmed activities and the phase may change. After editing, you need to reconfirm the respective activities.". It is not clear what will happened if I add something.

Now I have only this :

 

And I can use it only on DEV/CUST

What I really want:

 

 

If there are a better solution please inform me.

Thank you

entry.title: Trace mode in Integration Suite is not working
entry.content:
Even after changing the log level to Trace in the IFlow, it remains at Info and I cannot view the logs.

 

I have undeployed and redeployed the IFlow, and changed the log level to Trace again, but nothing has changed.

I have also tried using a different browser and clearing the cache, but it had no effect.

Please check and advise.

entry.title: Design an Integration Flow to Connect with Open Connectors - Stuck at STEP 4
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently trying to undergo this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-integration-suite-nonsapconnectivity-integration.html

But when trying to connect to my open connector using the credential I'm unable to retrieve the ressources list. Instead I get ans error message : 


 

I don't know where to find this tail log and even where to start looking at... I have redone all the steps multiple times and I don't know where  I missed thomething... @Karunaharan

entry.title: Integrate Qualtrics with Emarsys through SAP Integration Suite to transmit contacts
entry.content:
Hello community,

I’m new to the SAP Community and would like to ask you about SAP Integration Suite.

I’ve been reading this use case:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/integrate-qualtrics-surveys-directly-with-sap-emarsys-engagement-platform/ba-p/13552484,
and it’s very similar to what we need to implement.

We need to integrate Qualtrics with Emarsys to sync contacts between both platforms, and we’re considering acquiring SAP Integration Suite.

Could you help me understand what happens “inside” the platform — how it connects both systems and handles the integration?
Also, would you happen to know who I can contact to get pricing information for this product?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: IBP and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Integration
entry.content:
I'm currently setting up the integration between SAP IBP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and would like to confirm if my understanding is correct. I’d also appreciate links to relevant setup guides for each configuration step.

 My Understanding:

The integration requires three main configurations:

① Communication Settings on the S/4HANA Cloud side
I believe the following 4 communication scenarios are required:

SAP Datasphere - ABAP CDS Extraction - OData Integration (SAP_COM_0531)

Product Integration (SAP_COM_0009)

Business Partner, Customer and Supplier Integration (SAP_COM_0008)

Production Planning Integration (SAP_COM_0104)

Could you please confirm this is correct, and share setup documentation or Help Portal links for each scenario?

② Communication Settings on the IBP side
I understand that SAP_COM_0931 is the scenario used on the IBP side to receive data.
I would appreciate a guide on how to configure this: communication system, communication arrangement, receiving services, etc.

③ Configuration on Integration Suite (BTP)
Before deploying iFlows, I assume that we need to:

Enable services on Integration Suite

Configure connection parameters, such as communication system names and authentication credentials

Could you share specific instructions and documentation for this part?

My Current Setup Status:

Reviewed the Integration Flow package "SAP IBP – Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud" in BTP

Created communication arrangement SAP_COM_0009 on the S/4HANA Cloud side (see attached screenshot)

No communication configuration on the IBP side yet

Reference Materials I’m Using:

SAP IBP - Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Communication Management | SAP Help Portal

Setting Up the Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Help Portal

Please kindly let me know if my assumptions are correct and provide any official setup guides for the scenarios listed above.
